name: Staff of Swarming Insects
attunement_class: Bard, Cleric, Druid, Sorcerer, Warlock, or Wizard

insect_cloud.effect: Swarm of harmless flying insects fills 30-foot Emanation from you
insect_cloud.obscurement: Area Heavily Obscured for creatures other than you
insect_cloud.dispersal: Strong wind (like Gust of Wind) disperses swarm and ends effect

regaining_charges.on_roll_1: Swarm of insects consumes and destroys staff, then disperses
